s1.title: What Do I Need Right Now?
s1.description: A moment to pause and listen to what your heart is asking for.

Emotional support.label: Emotional support
Emotional support.prompt: What kind of support would actually help you right now?

Space / time for myself.label: Space / time for myself
Space / time for myself.prompt: What would having that space look like for you?

Clear communication.label: Clear communication
Clear communication.prompt: What would clearer communication look like for you?
hints: If they really listened, I'd tell them...

Reassurance.label: Reassurance
Reassurance.prompt: What kind of reassurance would feel meaningful?
hints: It would calm me to know...

Understanding.label: Understanding
Understanding.prompt: What would feeling truly understood look like?

Stability.label: Stability
Stability.prompt: What would stability feel like in your life right now?

Honesty.label: Honesty
Honesty.prompt: What would more honesty look like in your situation?
hints: The truth I need to face is...
I want to be honest about...

Respect.label: Respect
Respect.prompt: What does respect look like for you right now?

Clarity about relationship.label: Clarity about relationship
Clarity about relationship.prompt: What kind of clarity would help you most?
hints: I want us to be clear about...

default.prompt: What would this look like in a real situation?

toasts.auth_error: Auth session missing or DB not configured

complete.title: Check-in Complete
complete.message: You've identified that you need "{{need}}". Honoring your needs is a vital form of self-care.

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
